description_long: This is a modern, boxy couch with a minimalist design, featuring a deep navy blue seat and backrest set within a contrasting angular frame of warm brown material. The seat and back cushions are thick and appear integrated into the structure, providing a solid, supportive look. The armrests are straight, high, and extend the full depth of the couch, matching the brown frame and giving the piece a geometric, enclosed feel. The backrest is also high and rectangular, seamlessly attached to the seat and framed by the armrests. The base of the couch is solid and block-like, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy and grounded construction. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, public plazas, or modern outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy couch with a navy blue cushioned seat and backrest set in a solid brown angular frame, featuring high straight armrests and a continuous base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide navy blue seat and backrest framed by high, straight brown armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat and the full height of the armrest and backrest, with the solid brown frame enclosing the navy cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid brown back panel and the rectangular navy backrest, with the base fully enclosed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the continuous brown armrest and the integrated navy seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, integrated seat cushion and one large, attached back cushion; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is a continuous, block-like structure integrated with the frame.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, high, and flat armrests that are fully enclosed and match the brown frame, extending the full depth of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: High, rectangular, and attached backrest that is continuous and integrated with the seat, with no visible divisions or tufting.
